§6Cutting Machine§f:
The §6Cutting Machine §f(advancedrocketry:cuttingmachine) is a §emultiblock processing machine §f that §bcuts §6ingots and blocks §f into §6plates§f. It is the §6primary way §f to produce §6plates §f in Advanced Rocketry, which are §6required §f for most §6high-tier §f recipes.

§6Production Path (recipes/cuttingmachine.json)§f:
Pattern "aba / cde / opo":
- §ba§f: §6Steel Gear §f(gearSteel) — 2 (top left + top right)
- §bb§f: §6User Interface §f(advancedrocketry:misc:0) — 1 (top middle)
- §cc§f: §6Item IO Circuit Board §f(advancedrocketry:ic:4) — 1 (middle left)
- §cd§f: §6Structure Machine Frame §f(libvulpes:structuremachine) — 1 (middle centre)
- §ce§f: §6Control Circuit Board §f(advancedrocketry:ic:3) — 1 (middle right)
- §co§f: §6Obsidian §f(minecraft:obsidian) — 2 (bottom left + bottom right)
- §cp§f: §6Steel Plate §f(plateSteel) — 1 (bottom middle)
- Yields 1× Cutting Machine

§6Function§f:
- §bPlate production §f: §b1 ingot §f + §b1 §fSaw Blade = §b1 plate §f
- §bPower §f: §b100 RF/t §f at idle, scales with throughput
- §bMultiblock §f: 3×3×3 hollow cube with §6Structure Towers §f on the corners; the §6Cutting Machine §f block is in the centre
- §bSaw Blade slot §f: place a §6Saw Blade Assembly §f in the §binventory §f to enable cutting
- §bSpeed §f: 1 plate per §b2 seconds §f

§6Direct Descendants (TaskRetrieval graph)§f:
The jei-graph shows 0 items the Cutting Machine is a component of, but it is referenced in 132 §6use sites §f across the mod pack. Common uses:
- §bSteel plate production §f: required for §6Lathe §f and §6Rolling Machine §f
- §bTitanium plate production §f: for §6rocket parts §f
- §bCarbon plate production §f: for §6circuit components §f

§6Practical Use§f:
- §eTip§f: pair the §6Cutting Machine §f with an §6Import Bus §f (or §6Item IO Circuit Board §f) for §bautomated §fplate production
- §eTip§f: a §6Diamond Saw Blade §f will last §b4× longer §f than an §6Iron Saw Blade §f
- §cWarning§f: the §6Cutting Machine §f requires a §6Saw Blade §f in the slot — without it, the machine is §binert §f
- §cWarning§f: a §bdamaged §f Saw Blade will §cdestroy §f the ingot instead of cutting it — replace at §e20% §f or higher
